FYI â November 2020
FYI â November 2020
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Currency Volume
Currency Ordering Part
Section 9.6, Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes in Incoming Cash Parcels
We clarified that counterfeit bank notes received in Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) cash parcels can be returned to RBC via courier or armoured car. Cash should never be sent by mail.
Electronic Transactions Volume
PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct Part
Section 8.8, Adding and Deleting CRA Accounts
We added a note to clarify that the
PaymentStream
Direct CRA procedures are not related to Business Taxes, which is a different product on the
PaymentStream
Direct platform.
